metadata.description: On Airbnb, search for an apartment in Shibuya, Tokyo for July 01–07 next year for 2 guests, select a listing, and proceed to the "Confirm and pay" page with all guest and payment details filled in.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Airbnb, search for an apartment in Shibuya, Tokyo for July 01–07 next year for 2 guests, select a listing, and proceed to the "Confirm and pay" page with all guest and payment details filled in.
